items.title: Harbor Market Spring Menu
content: Our spring menu opens with a smoked mushroom tart and local asparagus bundles from the morning market.
Add the harbor-market-hero image near the top of the story and make it the featured image.

images.title: Harbor Market Hero
images.alt: Illustration of a spring market table with greens and flowers

items.title: Catering Gallery
content: Use this page for private event catering notes and a seasonal grazing table highlight.
Include the catering board image in the editable page content.
